raw_title: Book Review: ‘The Mortons,’ by Justine Larbalestier and Scott Westerfeld
book_title: ‘The Mortons,’ by Justine Larbalestier and Scott Westerfeld
description: In “The Mortons,” a young hit woman — a prodigy at killing — is tested by inherited secrets and her own morality.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘The Frenchmen,’ by Emily Eakin
description: In “The Frenchmen,” Emily Eakin traces the rise and fall of postmodernist philosophy, and the surprising ways its influence lingers.
A new compendium of Roberta Gregory’s comics does away with delicacy in the name of feminism.
Blending autobiography with meditations on craft, “Unsayable” feels destined for the graduation gift bag.
